parameters.formDescription: This will be where you put in a request to become a full member. Do keep in mind after submission this will be a process handled by leadership. You will get notified in the end of the process of approval or denial. NOTE: This may take time at this point notify leadership by approprate channel.

values.fieldLabel: Why are you here? What is the meaning of being a member to you?

parameters.message: ={{ $json.Name }} is asking to become a member, they had stated the reason to be a member is "{{ $json.Reason }}". Do you approve this user to be a member? (First Approval)

values.fieldLabel: Your Discord Name? (For first approval process)
=Do you Approve of {{ $json.Name }} becoming a member?

value.Name: ={{ $json['Discord Name (include full discord name)'] }}
value.Reason: ={{ $json['Why are you here? What is the meaning of being a member to you?'] }}

parameters.message: ={{ $json.Name }} is asking to become a member, they had stated the reason to be a member is "{{ $json.Reason }}". Do you approve this user to be a member? (Second Approval)

values.fieldLabel: Your Discord Name? (For second approval process)
=Do you Approve of {{ $json.Name }} becoming a member?

nodes.name: Send message and wait for response
